scripts.dev: concurrently -n "NEXT,WORKER,INVOICE,PAGE,CLASSIFY,DOCEXT" -c "blue,green,magenta,cyan,white,gray" "next dev" "node -r dotenv/config extra/workers/vehicle.mjs" "node -r dotenv/config extra/workers/invoice.mjs" "node -r dotenv/config extra/workers/invoicePage.mjs" "node -r dotenv/config extra/workers/classifyDocument.mjs" "node -r dotenv/config extra/workers/documentExtract.mjs"
scripts.start: concurrently --restart-tries 3 --restart-after 5000 -n "NEXT,WORKER,INVOICE,PAGE,CLASSIFY,DOCEXT" -c "blue,green,magenta,cyan,white,gray" "next start -p 3001 -H 0.0.0.0" "node -r dotenv/config extra/workers/vehicle.mjs" "node -r dotenv/config extra/workers/invoice.mjs" "node -r dotenv/config extra/workers/invoicePage.mjs" "node -r dotenv/config extra/workers/classifyDocument.mjs" "node -r dotenv/config extra/workers/documentExtract.mjs"
